=== bd00-06-29b-LB-3936.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 6/29/00, Irvine, California, 2CDR

LB-3936, (58min+35min), version "b"; trade cdrs > eac > wav > flac;  digipop at d2t1 0:40 was redrawn away; small drop d2t2 4:46 was pasted over from another  version of this recording and amplified to match; background talking d1t6, a few more spots of background talking and an occasional screamer;; excellent sound [A]; bittorrent download 08/06

CD1
1. Duncan And Brady (acoustic) 2. That Lucky Old Sun (acoustic) (song by Haven Gillespie and Beasley Smith) 3. Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on Dobro) 4. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 5. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) 6. Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on Mandolin) (song by Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin and Jack Anglin) 7. Country Pie 8. Tell Me That It Isn't True 9. Down In The Flood 10. I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met) (Bob on harp) 11. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 12. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat, 

CD2
1. (encore) 2. Things Have Changed 3. Like A Rolling Stone 4. Forever Young (acoustic) 5. Highway 61 Revisited 6. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic)

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates
